css: .w-webflow-badge, .w-webflow-badge > img { box-sizing: unset; width: unset; height: unset; max-height: unset; max-width: unset; min-height: unset; min-width: unset; margin: unset; padding: unset; float: unset; clear: unset; border: unset; border-radius: unset; background: unset; box-shadow: unset; t

.w-slider-dot { cursor: pointer; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); width: 1em; height: 1em; margin: 0px 3px 0.5em; transition: background-color 0.1s, color 0.1s; display: inline-block; position: relative; }
.w-lightbox-control { cursor: pointer; background-position: 50% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: 24px; width: 4em; transition: 0.3s; position: absolute; top: 0px; }

.w-lightbox-spinner { box-sizing: border-box; border: 5px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); border-radius: 50%; width: 40px; height: 40px; margin-top: -20px; margin-left: -20px; animation: 0.8s linear 0s infinite normal none running spin; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; }
.w-nav[data-animation="over-left"] .w-nav-overlay { width: auto; }
.w-nav[data-animation="over-left"] .w-nav-overlay, .w-nav[data-animation="over-left"] [data-nav-menu-open] { z-index: 1; top: 0px; right: auto; }
.w-nav[data-animation="over-right"] .w-nav-overlay { width: auto; }
.w-nav[data-animation="over-right"] .w-nav-overlay, .w-nav[data-animation="over-right"] [data-nav-menu-open] { z-index: 1; top: 0px; left: auto; }

name: spin

css: .p-body.is__map_link { transition: color 0.2s; }
.subtitle.is-pretty { opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s; position: absolute; inset: -1.5em auto auto 0%; transform: translateY(0.5em); }

.copy__button { gap: 0.5em; background-color: var(--color--faded-color); cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0.35em; flex-flow: row; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 0.45em; transition: background-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.15s; display: flex; position: relative; overflow: hidden; bo

.switcher__bg { border-radius: var(--border-radius--0-5); background-color: var(--color--accent); width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.439, 0.012, 0, 1.001); position: absolute; inset: 0%; }
.blog__wrapper { border: 1px solid var(--color--background); border-radius: 1em; flex-flow: column; padding: 0.19em; transition: border 0.2s; display: flex; position: relative; }

.swiper-slide.slider-new { border-radius: var(--border-radius--1); flex-flow: column; flex: 0 0 auto; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; width: 25em; height: 26em; padding: 0px; transition: opacity 0.5s, height 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.439, 0.007, 0.006, 1.007); display: flex; position
.arrow__bg { border-radius: 0.75em; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: filter 0.3s, border-color 0.4s, background-color 0.3s; position: absolute; }

.slider-main__button-rel { border-radius: 9.75px; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 3em; height: 3em; padding: 0px; transition: opacity 0.15s; display: flex; position: relative; }
.product__slider-arrow { transform-origin: 50% center; color: var(--color--text-body); object-fit: contain; width: 22%; height: auto; transition: opacity 0.2s; position: relative; inset: auto; }

.circle__item-bg { z-index: 0; background-color: rgb(99, 196, 253); border-radius: 10000px; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: transform 0.2s; display: flex; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }

.slide-scale { gap: 1em; border-radius: var(--border-radius--1-5); background-color: var(--color--background); flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 2em 2em 1.5em; transition: transform 0.4s; display: flex; position: relative;

.button_dropdown { gap: 0.35em; border-radius: var(--border-radius--0-5); font-family: var(--button-text--font-family); color: var(--color--text-body); letter-spacing: var(--button-text--letter-spacing); text-transform: uppercase; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); flex: 0 0 auto; justify-content:

.button_main { gap: 1em; border: 1px solid var(--color--button-bg); background-color: var(--color--button-bg); border-radius: 0.63em; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 2.8em; padding: 1px 3.7em 1px 1em; transition: background-color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; display: flex; position

.tag { border: 1px solid var(--color--background-secondary); border-radius: var(--border-radius--0-25); background-color: var(--color--background-secondary); padding: 0.25em 0.35em; transition: border-color 0.2s; position: relative; }

.cursor { z-index: 1000; background-color: var(--swatch--n-300); pointer-events: none; -webkit-text-stroke-color: rgb(191, 120, 160); border-radius: 0.35em; padding: 0.5rem; transition: opacity 0.2s; position: fixed; inset: 0% auto auto 0%; }

.et__card.solutions { box-sizing: border-box; column-gap: var(--common-used--size-1); row-gap: var(--common-used--size-1); background-color: var(--color--background); border-radius: 1.5em; min-height: 18em; padding: 2.5em 0px; transition: background-color 0.15s; }

.cta__inner-wrap { background-color: var(--color--accent); outline-offset: 0.25em; pointer-events: auto; border-radius: 1.5em; outline: rgb(95, 111, 119) solid 1px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; min-height: 24em; padding: 0.25em; transition: 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.363, 0.018, 0.023
.logo_wrap { border-radius: var(--border-radius--1); padding: 3em; transition: width 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.48, -0.005, 0, 0.989); position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.qa__icon-holder { color: var(--color--accent); width: 1.3em; height: 1.3em; transition: color 0.5s; position: relative; }
.qa__bg-wrapper { width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: opacity 0.35s; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }
.icon-holder { color: var(--color--accent); width: 1em; height: 1em; transition: color 0.5s; position: relative; }
.dynamic__icon-holder { color: rgb(155, 247, 255); width: 1.3em; height: 1.3em; transition: color 0.5s; position: relative; }
.dynamic__bg-wrapper { background-color: var(--color--background); pointer-events: none; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: opacity 0.2s; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }
.team_slider-inner { z-index: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.398, 0.012, 0.058, 0.995), opacity 0.4s; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }
.client__logo-image { pointer-events: none; transform-origin: 50% center; width: 90%; height: 90%; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.526, 0.007, 0, 0.989); }

.client__link { border: 1px solid var(--color--background-secondary); border-radius: var(--border-radius--0-75); justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 0.6em; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.526, 0.007, 0, 0.989), opacity 0.3s; position: absol
.close__job { gap: 0.5em; background-color: rgba(23, 24, 24, 0.08); border-radius: 0.38em; flex-flow: row; padding: 0.3em 0.35em; transition: background-color 0.2s; display: flex; }
.study__arrow-wrap { transform-origin: 50% center; color: var(--color--faded-color); object-fit: contain; width: 0.9em; height: 0.9em; transition: opacity 0.2s; position: relative; inset: auto; }
.pretty__button-outter { width: 20%; transition: width 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.632, -0.005, 0, 1.007); position: static; }

.button__form.is-subscribe { background-color: var(--swatch--a-400); font-family: var(--button-text--font-family); color: var(--swatch--n-800); font-size: var(--button-text--font-size); letter-spacing: var(--letter-spacing--3-5); text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 0.63em; width: auto; height:

.tab__single { gap: 1em; cursor: none; border-radius: 0.63em; flex: 0 0 auto; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 2.5em; transition: background-color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; display: flex; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.tab__active-bg { background-color: var(--color--button-border); border-radius: 0.63em; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: transform 0.2s; position: relative; transform: translateY(120%); }

.search__item { gap: 1.5em; background-color: rgba(213, 225, 231, 0); flex-flow: row; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 0.75em 2em; transition: background-color 0.3s; display: flex; }

.serach__thumb { border-radius: 0.5em; flex: 0 0 auto; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 6em; height: 4em; transition: border-radius 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.368, 0.012, 0.094, 0.977); display: flex; position: relative; inset: 0%; overflow: hidden; }
.clear__wrap { box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 0em var(--swatch--n-500); padding-bottom: 0.1em; transition: box-shadow 0.1s; }

.cms__search { border: 1px solid var(--color--background); font-family: var(--subtitle--font-family); color: var(--color--text-body); font-size: var(--subtitle--font-size); letter-spacing: var(--button-text--letter-spacing); text-transform: uppercase; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0); border

.cms__search-clean-wrap { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; border-radius: 0.3em; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 2em; height: 2em; transition: opacity 0.3s; display: flex; position: absolute; inset: 0.25em 0.25em 0.25em auto; transform: translate(1em) rotate(12deg); }
.sticky-card-overlay { z-index: 1; background-color: var(--color--background); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: opacity 0.3s; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }

.share__butons-bg { background-color: var(--color--background-secondary); opacity: 0.3; pointer-events: none; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: opacity 0.2s; display: flex; position: absolute; overflow: hidden; }

.share__button-inner { z-index: 1; color: var(--color--text-body); flex-flow: column; flex: 0 0 auto; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 2.5em; height: 2.5em; padding: 0.75em; transition: color 0.2s; display: flex; position: relative; }

.m-nav__btn { gap: 1em; border: 1px solid var(--color--button-bg); background-color: var(--color--button-bg); border-radius: 0.63em; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 2.8em; padding: 1px 3.7em 1px 1em; transition: background-color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; display: flex; position:

.m-nav__btn-hidden { gap: 1em; border: 1px solid var(--color--button-bg); background-color: var(--color--button-bg); border-radius: 0.63em; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 2.8em; padding: 1px 3.7em 1px 1em; transition: background-color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; display: flex; po

.m-nav__link { gap: 1em; border: 1px solid var(--color--button-bg); background-color: var(--color--button-bg); border-radius: 0.63em; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 2.8em; padding: 1px 3.7em 1px 1em; transition: background-color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; display: flex; position

.m-social-btn { gap: 1em; border: 1px solid var(--color--button-bg); background-color: var(--color--button-bg); border-radius: 0.63em; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 2.8em; padding: 1px 3.7em 1px 1em; transition: background-color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; display: flex; positio

.button_nav { gap: 0.6em; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border: 1px solid rgba(95, 111, 119, 0.5); border-radius: 0.63em; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 2.5em; padding: 1px 1em; transition: background-color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; display: flex; position: relative; over
.is__link-underline { box-shadow: inset 0 -1px 0 0 var(--swatch--n-500); padding-bottom: 0.2em; transition: box-shadow 0.1s; display: inline-block; position: relative; }

.sm__button { z-index: 1; color: var(--swatch--n-400); background-color: rgba(57, 66, 71, 0.5); border-radius: 0.63em; flex-flow: column; flex: 0 0 auto; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 2.3em; height: 2.3em; padding: 0.75em; transition: background-color 0.1s, color 0.1s; display

.cookie { z-index: 10; gap: 2em; background-color: var(--swatch--n-500); filter: brightness(105%); border-radius: 1em; flex-flow: column; width: 21em; min-height: 300px; padding: 2.5em; transition: transform 1s cubic-bezier(0.433, 0.006, 0, 0.995); display: none; position: fixed; inset: auto 0.5% 0.
.draggable__progress.is-pretty { opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s; position: absolute; inset: -1.5em auto auto 0%; transform: translateY(0.5em); }
.draggable__percent.is-pretty { opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s; position: absolute; inset: -1.5em auto auto 0%; transform: translateY(0.5em); }
.ext__link { color: var(--swatch--n-500); transition: color 0.2s; }

.nav-component .nav__overlay { --dur: 0.4s; --ease: ease-in-out; display: block; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none; position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 10; transition: opacity var(--dur) var(--ease),
      visibility var(--dur) var(--ease); }

.nav-component [data-nav="logo"], .nav-component [data-nav="contacts"] { --dur: 0.25s; --ease: ease-in-out; opacity: 1; visibility: visible; transition: opacity var(--dur) var(--ease),
      visibility var(--dur) var(--ease); }
.nav-component [data-module-btn] .button__text .nav-component [data-trigger="close-nav"] .button__text { --dur: 0.3s; --ease: ease-out; transition: color var(--dur) var(--ease); }
.nav-component [data-module-btn] .nav__plus { --dur: 0.25s; --ease: ease-out; transition: transform var(--dur) var(--ease), opacity var(--dur) var(--ease); }

.nav-component[data-show-modules="true"] [data-module-btn] .button__text, .nav-component[data-show-modules="true"] [data-trigger="close-nav"] .button__text { color: rgb(119, 133, 139); transition: color 0.1s; }
.floating__nav-wrapper .share__button-inner .share__icon { transition: opacity 0.12s; opacity: 0.75; }
.floating__nav-wrapper > * { transform: translateY(110%); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.5s, opacity 0.5s; }
.nav__module-inner { transition: background 0.2s; }
.nav__module-text { transition: color 0.2s; }
.nav__module-inner.is-small .blog__thumb-arrow { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-1.5em); transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.433, 0.001, 0.14, 1.007); }
.nav__module-inner.is-small .serach__thumb-overlay { opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s; background-color: var(--swatch--n-900); }
.nav__module-inner.is-small .image { transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.433, 0.001, 0.14, 1.007); }
.button_main .arrow-wrap { transition: width 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.579, 0.001, 0, 1.007); will-change: width; min-width: 2.7em; width: 2.7em; }
.button_main .arrow-parent { transition: transform 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.579, 0.001, 0, 1.007), color 1s; }
.button_main .h-arrow-wrap { inset: 0.1em auto 0.1em -3em; transition: inset 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.579, 0.001, 0, 1.007); }
.button_main .button__text { transition: transform 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.579, 0.001, 0, 1.007), color 0.5s; }
.button__borderless-inner { transition: transform 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.579, 0.001, 0, 1.007), color 1s; }
.borderles__underline { transition: opacity 0.65s; }
.tab__link-single .subtitle { color: var(--swatch--n-700); transition: color 0.5s; }
.tab__link-single { transition: border-color 0.6s, border-radius 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.368, 0.001, 0, 1.001); }
.search__item .serach__thumb .blog__thumb-arrow { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-1.3em); transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0, 0.457, 0.25, 1); }
.search__item .serach__thumb .serach__thumb-overlay { opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.5s; }
.filter-clear { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.368, 0.001, 0, 1.001); transform: translateX(0.5em); }
.cms__search-clean-wrap { transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.368, 0.001, 0, 1.001); }

.blog-rich a, .blog-rich a { color: var(--color--accent-second); padding-top: 0.5em; padding-bottom: 0.15em; transition: box-shadow 0.1s; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: inset 0 -1px var(--swatch--n-400); }
.blog__grid.is-33 .blog__wrapper .tag[data-wf--tag--variant="primary"] { background-color: var(--swatch--n-300); border: 1px solid var(--swatch--n-300); transition: background 0.3s, border 0.3s; }
.blog__grid.is-33 .blog__wrapper { background-color: transparent; transition: background 0.3s, border 0.3s; }
.blog__thumbnail { transform: scale(1.03); transition: transform 0.7s, opacity 0.3s; opacity: 1; }
.blog__overlay { transition: opacity 0.3s; }
.content__link { transition: color 0.2s ease-out; display: -webkit-box; overflow: hidden; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; }
.cta__btn-icon, .cta__btn-text { transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.602, -0.005, 0, 0.995); }
.cta__btn-text .heading-style-h4 { transition: letter-spacing 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.602, -0.005, 0, 0.995), transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.602, -0.005, 0, 0.995); }
.clients_track { animation: 60s linear 0s infinite normal none running marquee; will-change: transform; }

name: marquee

css: .clients__stopper { transform: translateX(0%); transition: transform 60s linear; }
.slide-scale { scale: 1; transition: scale 0.25s ease-in-out; }
.slide-scale.scaled { scale: 0.92; transition: scale 0.35s ease-in-out 0.15s; }
.timeline__slider .swiper-wrapper { transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.544, 0.001, 0, 0.995); }
.simple-slider .swiper-wrapper { transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.38, 0.007, 0, 1.007); }
.simple-slider .swiper-slide { transition: transform 0.85s cubic-bezier(0.38, 0.007, 0, 1.007), opacity 0.8s; transform-origin: 50% 50%; }
.case-studies-wrap h3 { opacity: 0.3; font-size: 1.13em; transition: opacity 0.3s ease-in; }
.cs__wrap { transform: translateY(3.5em); transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.485, 0.012, 0, 1.001); }
.study__bg { opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.1s; }
.case-studies-wrap .et__card .award__outter { transform: scale(1); transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.485, 0.012, 0, 1.001), opacity 0.3s; }
.study__arrow-wrap { transform: translate(-1em, 1em) scale(0.6); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.485, 0.012, 0, 1.001), opacity 0.3s; }
.pretty__bg { filter: brightness(100%); transition: -webkit-filter 0.12s linear; }

.custom__cursor-img { pointer-events: none; transform: rotate(0deg); z-index: 2; clip-path: polygon(21% 8%, 0px 0px, 9% 25%, 15% 43%, 21% 60%, 28% 81%, 35% 100%, 54% 55%, 100% 34%, 77% 26%, 52% 18%, 36% 13%); transition: clip-path 0.25s, transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.427, 0.001, 0, 0.995), opacity 0
.globe__container { --x: 4em; --y: -1em; position: relative; height: calc(89.375em); width: calc(184.75em); aspect-ratio: 2956 / 1430; transition: transform 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); }

.globe__countries .country { --dur: 0.3s; --ease: ease-in-out; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; cursor: none; transition: opacity var(--dur) var(--ease), visibility var(--dur) var(--ease); }
.close__bg { transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.3s; }
.progress-thumb { transition: opacity 0.3s; cursor: none !important; }
.progress__bg { transition: transform 0.3s; }
